title: Request password reset shows confirmation message
description: Verifies submitting the reset password form displays a visible confirmation message.

title: Open Dashboard and verify the 3-zone layout is visible
description: Verifies an authenticated user can reach the dashboard and see the Now/Today/Context zones and widgets.

title: From Dashboard, open Habits via a widget item
description: Verifies a user can navigate from the dashboard to the Habits page by clicking a Habits widget item.

steps.description: Click on a visible item inside the Habits widget

title: From Dashboard, open Habits via the main navigation entry (if present)
description: Verifies navigation to Habits works even if the user uses a Habits entry point from the dashboard page layout.

title: From Dashboard, open Tasks via the Tasks widget
description: Verifies a user can navigate from the dashboard to the Tasks page by clicking the Tasks widget entry point.

title: Dashboard widgets render with visible content placeholders
description: Verifies the dashboard shows visible widget content (not an empty/blank state) across the three zones.

title: Dashboard remains accessible after navigating away and returning via a click
description: Verifies a user can leave the dashboard to another feature and return to the dashboard using in-app navigation.

title: Invalid login prevents reaching the Dashboard
description: Verifies the dashboard is not reachable when login fails using invalid credentials.

title: Dashboard loads successfully after login and shows an overview header
description: Verifies the dashboard page provides a recognizable overview heading/label after authentication.

title: Create a new habit and verify it appears in the habits list
description: Verifies a user can create a habit and see it listed on the Habit Tracker page.

steps.description: Click on "Habits" in the main navigation
Type "Daily Walk" into the habit title field
Select "Morning" from the time of day dropdown

title: Mark an existing habit complete and verify completion state updates
description: Verifies a user can mark a habit as complete for the day and see the UI reflect completion.

steps.description: Click on "Habits" in the main navigation
Click the completion checkbox next to the first habit in the list

title: Create habit validation: missing title shows an error
description: Verifies the habit creation form enforces a required title and shows a visible validation message.

steps.description: Click on "Habits" in the main navigation
Verify text "Title is required" is visible

title: Delete a habit and confirm it is removed from the list
description: Verifies a user can delete a habit with confirmation and it no longer appears in the habits list.

steps.description: Click on "Habits" in the main navigation
Click on the first habit in the list

title: Edit habit details and verify updated values are shown
description: Verifies a user can edit an existing habit and see the updated details reflected in the UI.

steps.description: Click on "Habits" in the main navigation
Click on the first habit in the list
Type "Updated Habit Title" into the habit title field
Verify text "Updated Habit Title" is visible

title: View habit streaks and statistics section is visible for a selected habit
description: Verifies habit streaks/statistics are accessible and visible from a habit details view.

steps.description: Click on "Habits" in the main navigation
Click on the first habit in the list

title: Cancel habit deletion from confirmation dialog keeps the habit
description: Verifies canceling a delete confirmation does not remove the habit from the list.

steps.description: Click on "Habits" in the main navigation
Click on the first habit in the list

title: Mark a habit complete twice does not duplicate completion indication
description: Verifies clicking the completion checkbox again does not create a second completion state and the UI remains consistent.

steps.description: Click on "Habits" in the main navigation
Click the completion checkbox next to the first habit in the list
Click the completion checkbox next to the first habit in the list

title: View events list by selecting a date in the calendar month view
description: Verifies a user can open the calendar, select a date, and see the events list update for the selected date.

steps.description: Click the "Calendar" item in the main navigation
Click on a date cell in the month calendar grid

title: Selecting a date shows an events section for that date (empty state acceptable)
description: Verifies that selecting a date reveals an events list area for that date, even if no events exist.

steps.description: Click the "Calendar" item in the main navigation
Click on a date cell in the month calendar grid

title: Navigate to next month using the Next control
description: Verifies that clicking the Next month control updates the displayed month view.

steps.description: Click the "Calendar" item in the main navigation

title: Navigate to next month keeps calendar functional for date selection
description: Verifies that after moving to the next month, the user can still select a date in the new month view.

steps.description: Click the "Calendar" item in the main navigation
Click on a date cell in the month calendar grid

title: Attempt to create an event with end date/time before start shows validation error
description: Verifies the create event form blocks saving when the end is before the start and shows a visible validation message.

steps.description: Click the "Calendar" item in the main navigation

title: Create event validation: end before start prevents event from appearing in the selected date list
description: Verifies that after the invalid save attempt, the event does not appear in the events list for that date.

steps.description: Click the "Calendar" item in the main navigation
Fill "Invalid Date Event" into the "Title" field

title: Calendar renders a navigable month view after login
description: Verifies the calendar page loads successfully and shows core UI needed for navigation and date interaction.

steps.description: Click the "Calendar" item in the main navigation

title: Monthly/weekly calendar view control is visible (view toggle presence)
description: Verifies the calendar offers a visible control indicating a monthly/weekly view option exists.

steps.description: Click the "Calendar" item in the main navigation

title: Create a new journal entry and verify it appears in the list
description: Verifies a user can create a new journal entry and see it listed afterward.

steps.description: Click on "Journal" in the app navigation
Type "E2E Test Entry - Create flow" into the entry content field
Verify text "E2E Test Entry - Create flow" is visible

title: Attempt to save a new journal entry with empty content and verify validation error
description: Verifies the journal entry form prevents saving when content is empty and shows a required-field message.

steps.description: Click on "Journal" in the app navigation

title: Cancel creating a new journal entry and verify no new entry is added
description: Verifies a user can abandon creation of a new entry without saving and returns to the list without adding content.

steps.description: Click on "Journal" in the app navigation
Type "E2E Test Entry - Should not save" into the entry content field
Verify text "E2E Test Entry - Should not save" is not visible

title: Verify journal entries list loads and is viewable
description: Verifies the journal page renders the entries list area for a logged-in user.

steps.description: Click on "Journal" in the app navigation
Verify element "Journal entries list" is visible

title: Ensure Save is disabled or blocked until journal content is provided (UI guard)
description: Verifies the UI prevents saving a new entry before content is entered (disabled Save or visible prompt).

steps.description: Click on "Journal" in the app navigation

title: Log a valid health metric entry and see it appear in list and chart
description: Verifies a user can log a valid health metric and the new entry is visible in the metric list and reflected in the chart.

steps.description: Click on "Health" in the main navigation
Select "Sleep" from the metric type dropdown

title: Open Health page and view the health metrics dashboard
description: Verifies the health metrics dashboard loads and key health metrics content is visible.

steps.description: Click on "Health" in the main navigation

title: View sleep trend chart with historical values rendered
description: Verifies the sleep trend chart is visible and shows historical values on the Health page.

steps.description: Click on "Health" in the main navigation
Scroll to the sleep trend chart section
Verify element "Sleep trend chart" is visible

title: Validation error for non-numeric value in a numeric metric
description: Verifies the form shows a validation error when a non-numeric value is entered for a numeric metric and Save is attempted.

steps.description: Click on "Health" in the main navigation
Select "Water" from the metric type dropdown
Verify text "must be a number" is visible

title: Cancel logging a health entry without saving
description: Verifies a user can open the log entry form and cancel/close it without creating a new entry.

steps.description: Click on "Health" in the main navigation
Verify element "Log health" is not visible

title: Required-field validation when attempting to save an empty health entry
description: Verifies required-field errors appear when trying to save without filling mandatory fields.

steps.description: Click on "Health" in the main navigation

title: Log a mood entry and verify it appears in the metric list
description: Verifies logging a non-numeric style metric (mood) results in a visible entry in the metric list.

steps.description: Click on "Health" in the main navigation
Select "Mood" from the metric type dropdown

title: Add a new transaction and verify it appears in the transaction table
description: Verifies a user can create an income/expense transaction and see it listed in the table (accepting AI category if presented).

steps.description: Click on "Finances" in the main navigation
Select "Expense" from the transaction type dropdown
Click on "Accept" for the suggested category (if visible)

title: Verify financial overview cards and charts are visible on Finances page
description: Verifies the finances landing page shows key summary cards and at least one chart/report visualization.

steps.description: Click on "Finances" in the main navigation

title: Validation: prevent saving when amount is non-numeric
description: Verifies amount field validation blocks saving a transaction when amount is not a number.

steps.description: Click on "Finances" in the main navigation
Select "Expense" from the transaction type dropdown
Type "Invalid amount test" into the description field

title: Validation: prevent saving when amount is negative (if not allowed)
description: Verifies the UI shows a validation error and does not create a transaction when a negative amount is entered.

steps.description: Click on "Finances" in the main navigation
Select "Expense" from the transaction type dropdown
Type "Negative amount test" into the description field

title: Cancel add transaction and verify no new transaction is created
description: Verifies a user can dismiss the add transaction form and no new record appears in the transaction list.

steps.description: Click on "Finances" in the main navigation
Select "Income" from the transaction type dropdown
Type "Should not save" into the description field
Verify text "Should not save" is not visible

title: Set a financial goal and verify it is displayed
description: Verifies a user can create a financial goal from the finances page and see it listed/visible afterwards.

steps.description: Click on "Finances" in the main navigation
Type "Emergency Fund" into the goal name field
Type "500" into the goal amount field

title: Create a new project successfully and see it in the project list
description: Verifies a user can create a project with valid details and it appears in the project list.

steps.description: Click on "Projects" in the main navigation
Verify text "Create a new project" is visible

title: Create a project with name and details and verify it shows in the list
description: Verifies that saving a newly created project returns to the list where the new project is visible.

steps.description: Click on "Projects" in the main navigation
Type "E2E Project Alpha" into the project name field

title: Save a newly created project and verify it appears in the project list
description: Verifies that clicking Save creates the project and the list displays it.

steps.description: Click on "Projects" in the main navigation
Type "E2E Project Beta" into the project name field

title: Attempt to create a project without a name and verify validation error
description: Verifies the project creation form prevents saving when the project name is missing and shows an error message.

steps.description: Click on "Projects" in the main navigation
Verify text "Project name is required" is visible

title: Cancel project creation and verify user returns to project list without creating
description: Verifies that a user can back out of project creation and does not see a new project added implicitly.

steps.description: Click on "Projects" in the main navigation
Verify text "Create a new project" is visible

title: AI Assistant chat: send a message and see AI response in history
description: Verifies a user can send a chat message and see an AI response appear in the conversation history.

steps.description: Type "{{LOGIN_USER}}" into the email or username field
Click on "AI Assistant" in the main navigation
Type "What are 3 ways to stay focused for 25 minutes?" into the chat message input field
Verify text "What are 3 ways to stay focused for 25 minutes?" is visible

title: Start, pause, resume, and complete a focus session and verify it is recorded in history
description: Verifies a user can run a full focus session lifecycle and that completion creates a visible history entry.

title: Pause an active focus session and verify paused state is visible
description: Verifies pausing an active session updates the UI to show a paused state.

title: Resume a paused focus session and verify running state is visible
description: Verifies resuming after pause returns the timer to a running state.

title: Complete an active focus session and verify a completion indicator is shown
description: Verifies completing a session ends the session and shows a visible completion state/message.

title: View focus history after completing a session
description: Verifies focus history is accessible and shows at least one recorded session after completion.

title: Attempt to start a new focus session while one is running shows an already-active warning
description: Verifies the UI prevents starting another session when a session is already active and shows a warning message.

steps.description: Verify text "session is already active" is visible

title: Verify focus history section is visible on the Focus page
description: Verifies the Focus page exposes a visible focus history area for users to review past sessions.

title: View achievements list and XP progress on Gamification page
description: Verifies that a logged-in user can access Gamification and see achievements plus XP/level progress.

steps.description: Click the "Gamification" item in the main navigation

title: Open an achievement detail modal from the achievements list
description: Verifies that clicking an achievement opens its detail modal.

steps.description: Click the "Gamification" item in the main navigation
Click the first achievement in the achievements list

title: Close achievement detail modal
description: Verifies that the achievement detail modal can be dismissed.

steps.description: Click the "Gamification" item in the main navigation
Click the first achievement in the achievements list
Click the "Close" button on the achievement detail modal

title: View leaderboard with ranked users and points
description: Verifies that the leaderboard opens and shows ranking information.

steps.description: Click the "Gamification" item in the main navigation

title: Leaderboard loading state is shown while fetching rankings
description: Verifies that a loading indicator appears when opening the leaderboard (if loading is not instantaneous).

steps.description: Click the "Gamification" item in the main navigation

title: Gamification page displays XP and level progress section
description: Verifies that XP and level progress is visible on the Gamification page.

steps.description: Click the "Gamification" item in the main navigation

title: Open Settings page from an authenticated session
description: Verifies that a logged-in user can reach and view the Settings page.

steps.description: Click on "Settings" in the primary navigation menu

title: Change theme setting and save successfully
description: Verifies that changing the theme and saving applies the updated theme preference.

steps.description: Click on "Settings" in the primary navigation menu
Select a different option from the Theme dropdown

title: Verify theme update is applied after saving
description: Verifies that the UI reflects the new theme after the user saves theme changes.

steps.description: Click on "Settings" in the primary navigation menu
Select a different option from the Theme dropdown

title: Change language preference and save successfully
description: Verifies that changing the language and saving updates the UI language.

steps.description: Click on "Settings" in the primary navigation menu
Select a different option from the Language dropdown

title: Verify UI language changes after saving
description: Verifies that at least one visible label changes to the selected language after save.

steps.description: Click on "Settings" in the primary navigation menu
Select a different option from the Language dropdown

title: Update profile information and save successfully
description: Verifies that a user can edit profile fields and save without validation errors.

steps.description: Click on "Settings" in the primary navigation menu
Fill "Test User" into the Display name field

title: Profile update shows validation error and highlights fields
description: Verifies that invalid profile input triggers a server-side validation error message and indicates the invalid field.

steps.description: Click on "Settings" in the primary navigation menu
Verify element "Email field error message" is visible

title: Save with required profile field cleared shows inline error
description: Verifies that clearing a required profile field and saving prevents success and shows an inline error state.

steps.description: Click on "Settings" in the primary navigation menu
Fill "" into the Display name field

title: Create a new course and confirm it appears in the courses list
description: Verifies a user can create a course from the University page and see it listed afterward.

title: Save a newly created course with valid details
description: Verifies the course creation form accepts valid input and returns to the list view.

steps.description: Fill "Test Course - Intro to Biology" into the course name field

title: Create course end-to-end and verify it is visible in the list
description: Verifies full course creation flow including saving and confirming the new course row is visible.

steps.description: Fill "Test Course - Calculus I" into the course name field
Verify text "Test Course - Calculus I" is visible

title: Run the What-If simulator and verify a predicted final grade is shown
description: Verifies the What-If simulator accepts hypothetical grades and displays a prediction result.

steps.description: Fill "90" into the hypothetical grade field

title: What-If simulator handles empty inputs gracefully
description: Verifies the What-If simulator shows a visible validation message or prevents running when required inputs are empty.

title: Course creation validation: required fields empty shows error
description: Verifies the Create course form blocks saving and shows visible validation errors when required fields are missing.
